completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part (project_type_id: cli). TypeScript CLI binary 'tmr' built with commander, tsup, Node.js ESM.
Found 4 existing docs: README.md, CHANGELOG.md, SECURITY.md, examples/README.md
Tech stack: TypeScript 5.x on Node.js 18+. Primary framework: Commander.js. AI providers: OpenAI/Claude/Gemini via Strategy pattern.
Deep scan: 12 commands, 22 services, 6 providers, 14 type files, 4 utils, 2 workflows, 1 template read. 5-step AI pipeline documented.
Source tree documented with annotated descriptions for all 65+ source files. Lazy loading architecture noted.
Dev setup and CI/CD documented. GitHub Actions: lint → typecheck → build → test → coverage on main.
architecture.md written: system design, all 5 subsystems, error hierarchy (8 error types), output modes, lazy loading table.
Master index.md generated with navigation, quick reference, getting started, and key architecture decisions table.
Validation complete. No incomplete markers. All 4 generated docs verified to exist on disk.
